programmes.show_description: Florence: Rob and Rylan arrive in the majestic Renaissance city of Florence, the city where art changed the world.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Damo stumbles into something huge. TK finds his footing. Madonna offers an olive branch.
Leah's upset because she unintentionally hurt Justin when she implied that his romantic surprise for her involved a bit of unnecessary spending.
Beer Necessities: Mark leaves school grounds with Fox's brothers who challenge him to drink his first beer.
Bristol: On Wales's Gower Peninsula, Rick Stein meets a farmer raising salt marsh lamb who's thankful that none of his sheep have been blown up by the WWII bombs still buried there.
Suffolk: Halfway through his tour of Britain's favourite foods, Rick Stein visits a Suffolk bakery making artisan sourdough.
Asturias: Eva Longoria journeys to her ancestral Asturias, exploring its mountains, orchards, and coastline while uncovering local food heritage.
Newly widowed Frank Fogle embarks on a journey to Ireland to scatter his late wife's ashes. His estranged son, Sean, recently released from prison, agrees to join him.
Featuring performances from Gruff Rhys, Ye Vagabonds, KhakiKid, RÓIS, Melin Melyn , Panic Shack, Sorry & Master Peace.
Tim Renkow welcomes comedians Janine Harouni and Stuart Goldsmith to the stage.
Programmes start at 12:05.
Tane and Jo are enjoying the early-days bliss of their new relationship, happy to finally be together after what felt like a lifetime of longing.
John has a cuppa with Dana and checks in on how she's going post-breakup. She tells him she's just trying to keep busy and has taken on some extra shifts at work.
Sonny's changed his emergency contact to Remi after breaking up with Dana, but Remi had no idea.
After female mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show, she is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.
It's the final, and after challenges including opera gloves, party paraphernalia and a draped evening outfit, one sewer will be crowned winner.
It's up to the wire as the planners battle to impress the judges and pull off a millionaire's garden party for Lauren and Jodie.
Sparks fly as the planners clash over plans for a multi-themed wedding, their toughest challenge yet. With two venues to arrange, can they pull together and impress the judges?
The latest news and updates from the UEFA Champions League.

programmes.show_name: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programmes.show_description: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work 3000 meters above sea-level at Gangtey Lodge, Bhutan, in a remote region that only obtained electricity 11 years ago.
In Eastbourne, a routine day at the station changes in an instant when a boat catches fire just outside the harbour.
The Nazi Child Army: Part one of two. The story of the Nazi youth organisation, which was used to indoctrinate German boys in the 1930s and prepare them for the war Hitler was planning.
Fact-based thriller, recreating the 1944 plot by a conspiracy of rebel German officers to assassinate Adolf Hitler using a briefcase bomb. Starring Tom Cruise and Kenneth Branagh.
